monitor_the_situation.title: Iranian Ballistic Missiles Strike Al-Azraq Air Base in Jordan

— S4 · Conflict · Al-Azraq Air Base, Jordan · 23h ago. IRGC claims Khaybar-shekan ballistic missiles hit US fighter jet maintenance ramp and command center at Al-Azraq Air Base, Jordan, in 8th wave of Nasr 2 operation.
US Launches Fresh Strikes on Iran, Reimposes Blockade as Ceasefire Collapses
Iran Strikes US Bases in Kuwait, Bahrain, and Jordan With Missiles and Drones
US Navy Destroyer Fires Tomahawk Missiles at Iran
— S3 · Conflict · Strait of Hormuz · 4m ago. Newly released footage shows the USS Milius (DDG-69) firing Tomahawk cruise missiles at Iran, indicating ongoing US military action in the region.
